query:
SELECT 
  status,
  COUNT(*) as total_itens,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN valor IS NOT NULL AND valor > 0 THEN 1 END) as com_valor,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN valor IS NULL OR valor = 0 THEN 1 END) as sem_valor,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN valor IS NOT NULL THEN valor ELSE 0 END), 2) as soma_valor
FROM patrimonio_items
GROUP BY status;

  COUNT(CASE WHEN valor IS NULL OR valor = 0 THEN 1 END) as sem_valor,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN valor IS NOT NULL THEN valor ELSE 0 END), 2) as soma_valor
